title: Individual: Mr. Frederic Borràs Pàmies
text:
Status: Final at the administrative level. Appealed before the administrative courts.

A financial sanction in the amount of 40.000 euros in addition to a suspension for a period of 5 years from exercising any administrative or general management positions, imposed for the commission of a very serious offence under article 18.1 b of Law regulating the financial system’s disciplinary regime , in its version in force until March 2015. Currently set out in Article 15.g (15.f), A financial sanction in the amount of 20.000 euros in addition to a suspension for a period of 2 years and 6 months from exercising any administrative or general management positions, in law or in fact, imposed for the commission of a serious offence under article 18.2 b of Law regulating the financial system’s disciplinary regime , in its version in force until March 2015. Currently set out in Article 16.c (16.d), A financial sanction in the amount of 20.000 euros in addition to a suspension for a period of 2 years and 6 months from exercising any administrative or general management positions, in law or in fact, imposed for the commission of a serious offence under article 18.2 b of Law regulating the financial system’s disciplinary regime , in its version in force until March 2015. Currently set out in Article 16.g (16.h).
status: Status: Final at the administrative level. Appealed before the administrative courts.
